prompt: What's the escalation path for a critical cost anomaly?
reference_response: Per the FinOps runbook: critical cost anomalies (impact > $5,000/day) escalate to the on-call FinOps engineer via PagerDuty within 1 hour. The runbook lives in the FinOps Knowledge Base; the escalation owner is finops-oncall@example.com. If unresolved within 24 hours, the issue escalates to the platform director.
pre_recorded_response: Per the FinOps runbook: critical cost anomalies (impact > $5,000/day) escalate to the on-call FinOps engineer via PagerDuty within 1 hour. The runbook lives in the FinOps Knowledge Base; the escalation owner is finops-oncall@example.com. If unresolved within 24 hours, the issue escalates to the platform director.
